description.value:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

You vent most of your ink all at once, filling a small area with obscuring droplets. You create a stationary cloud of ink in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] centered on your current location. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Concealed] while inside the cloud, and creatures outside the area are concealed to creatures inside the cloud. The ink dissipates at the start of your next turn. This ability functions equally effectively above or below water.
